description: MCP server for managing Nextcloud Tasks (todos) via CalDAV, allowing Claude to view, add, complete, edit, and delete tasks with GitHub OAuth authentication.

name: PowerPoint MCP
description: Full-featured PowerPoint MCP server with cross-platform support (Windows native, macOS designed). Control PowerPoint programmatically via the Model Context Protocol — 153 tools covering slides, shapes, text, formatting, charts, tables, animations, and more.

name: MCP Dev.to + LinkedIn Integration
description: Automates posting articles to Dev.to and sharing posts on LinkedIn via command-line, cron jobs, or Copilot sessions.

name: Cron Job Doctor MCP
description: Diagnoses scheduled GitHub Actions workflows for anomalies like stuck jobs, retry storms, duration creep, or recent failures.

name: cosmos-mcp
description: MCP server for searching cosmos.so, returning direct CDN image URLs without page scraping.

name: Taistock MCP Server
description: Deploys a remote MCP server on Cloudflare Workers without authentication, allowing easy customization and connection to AI Playground or Claude Desktop.

name: sigmavue-mcp
description: MCP server for controlling SigmaVue trading accounts from the terminal or MCP-speaking assistants. Provides tools for account status, journal, portfolio, simulated trade execution, and copy-trading group management.

name: redbus-mcp
description: Enables natural language queries for interprovincial bus schedules, cities, and seat maps in Peru via RedBus, without booking or payment.

name: signal-scanner
description: YAML-rule stock/crypto screener: define a watchlist + plain rules (RSI, SMA cross, volume, 52-week) and get matches via console, Telegram, or MCP. Keyless (yfinance).

name: signal-mcp-server
description: MCP server that wraps a running signal-cli daemon's JSON-RPC API as MCP tools, enabling list contacts, groups, conversations, read and send messages, and react to messages on Signal.

name: model-council-mcp
description: Routes questions to multiple AI models (local and cloud) and synthesizes their answers in individual, categorized, or deconflicted modes.

name: Rentman MCP Server
description: Provides live access to Rentman account resources including projects, equipment, contacts, and crew through natural language queries via ChatGPT and Claude.

name: url-context-mcp
description: An MCP server that fetches web pages and extracts clean, AI-usable context from them, enabling tools for link discovery, content search, and integrated fetch-and-search operations.

name: OPNsense MCP Server
description: This MCP server enables AI agents to inspect and modify an OPNsense firewall via natural language, using a compact set of generic tools and a resource registry to cover 96 CRUD operations.

name: linkseek
description: 自托管的远程 MCP 服务，为 AI 编程工具提供联网搜索和网页获取能力，并配有网页端管理后台进行密钥和用量管理。

name: Web Search MCP Server
description: A universal web search and content retrieval tool for AI agents, supporting multiple search providers and content extraction.

name: Almond MCP
description: Enables interaction with Rhino 8 for architectural design, furniture placement, structural analysis, and publishing to Chestnut via MCP tools.

name: Creator Research MCP
description: Fetches content data from YouTube, TikTok, Twitter, LinkedIn, articles, and PDFs so LLM clients can analyze content performance and generate insights.

name: Revolut Business MCP
description: Read-only Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposing Revolut Business transaction data to MCP clients over stdio.

name: mcp-soundfx
description: An MCP server that runs Stability AI's Stable Audio Open 1.0 locally on NVIDIA GPUs, enabling AI agents to generate broadcast-quality 44.1 kHz stereo WAV sound effects from text prompts fully offline with no API costs.
